articles.title: New Delhi: Heatwave Grips National Capital Amid Soaring Temperatures #Gallery - Social News XYZ
articles.full_text:
New Delhi: A man rides a cycle near India Gate amid soaring temperatures during a hot summer day in New Delhi on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
New Delhi: Visitors stand near barricades, covering themselves with scarves at Kartavya Path with India Gate in the background amid soaring temperatures in New Delhi on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
New Delhi: A few people walk along Kartavya Path amid intense heat conditions in New Delhi on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
New Delhi: A small girl walks along Kartavya Path while shielding herself from the harsh sun during a hot summer day in New Delhi on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
New Delhi: Visitors stand near barricades at Kartavya Path with India Gate in the background during a hot summer day in New Delhi on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
New Delhi: A sparsely populated stretch of Kartavya Path is seen amid scorching heat conditions in New Delhi on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. (Photo: IANS/Qamar Sibtain)
